# .claude/autoimprove/config.md
<!-- Auto-generated by /autoimprove:setup — edit to customise -->

## Stack
- Language: Bash / Markdown
- Framework: Claude Code Plugin (skills + commands + hooks)
- Package manager: none

## Measurement Commands

### Shell Lint (40 pts)
```bash
shellcheck hooks/sessionstart.sh 2>&1
```
Error pattern: `grep -c "^In\|error\|warning"`
Penalty: 5 pts per error/warning (min 0)
Fallback if shellcheck not installed: 40/40 (skip)

### Markdown Lint (20 pts)
```bash
# Count broken internal links, empty skill files, missing frontmatter
bad=0
for f in skills/*/SKILL.md commands/*.md; do
  [ -s "$f" ] || bad=$((bad + 1))
done
echo "empty_files=$bad"
```
Error pattern: count of empty/missing required files
Penalty: 5 pts per empty file (min 0)

### Structure Validation (30 pts)
```bash
# Verify plugin structure: all skills have SKILL.md, commands are valid, hooks are executable
errors=0
for d in skills/*/; do
  [ -f "${d}SKILL.md" ] || errors=$((errors + 1))
done
for f in hooks/*.sh; do
  [ -x "$f" ] || errors=$((errors + 1))
done
[ -f ".claude-plugin/plugin.json" ] || errors=$((errors + 1))
[ -f "VERSION" ] || errors=$((errors + 1))
echo "structure_errors=$errors"
```
Penalty: 10 pts per error (min 0)

### Documentation Quality (10 pts)
```bash
# Check README exists and has reasonable content
wc -l README.md 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}'
```
Score: 10 if README > 50 lines, 5 if > 20 lines, 0 otherwise

## Improvement Areas
- Fix shellcheck warnings in hook scripts
- Ensure all skill SKILL.md files have complete frontmatter (name, description)
- Remove dead code or unreachable branches in shell scripts
- Improve error handling in sessionstart.sh (graceful degradation)
- Add input validation to shell scripts
- Ensure consistent markdown formatting across skill and command files
- Reduce duplication across command .md files
- Improve README clarity and completeness

## Files to Never Modify
- .git/
- VERSION (managed by release process)
- .claude-plugin/marketplace.json
- autoimprove.png
- LICENSE
